get.description: SSE stream of LLM tokens while the job is running.

created_job_id.title: Created Job Id
created_job_id.description: UUID of the job that created this artifact. Null for source artifacts created during ingest.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable name for this context entry.

text.title: Text
text.description: The context text injected into LLM prompts.

system_prompt.title: System Prompt
system_prompt.description: Optional freeform context injected into every system prompt.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable name for this context entry.

text.title: Text
text.description: The context text injected into LLM prompts.

current_job_id.title: Current Job Id
current_job_id.description: UUID of the most recently active job for this document.

additional_context.title: Additional Context
additional_context.description: Free-text context attached by the user to guide LLM stages.

linked_contexts.title: Linked Contexts
linked_contexts.description: UUIDs of saved context entries linked to this document.

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.description: Files associated with this document (e.g. source image).

current_job_id.title: Current Job Id
current_job_id.description: UUID of the most recently active job for this document.

embed_image.title: Embed Image
embed_image.description: Whether to include a visual image vector in addition to the text vector.

document_id.title: Document Id
document_id.description: UUID of the document this job belongs to.

runs.title: Runs
runs.description: Ordered list of LLM round trips for this job. Appended on each execution.

require_context.title: Require Context
require_context.description: Whether this stage requires context before it can run.

document_id.title: Document Id
document_id.description: UUID of the document this job belongs to.

next_page_token.title: Next Page Token
next_page_token.description: Opaque cursor; pass as `page_token` on next request. Null when no more pages.

next_page_token.title: Next Page Token
next_page_token.description: Opaque cursor; pass as `page_token` on next request. Null when no more pages.

next_page_token.title: Next Page Token
next_page_token.description: Opaque cursor; pass as `page_token` on next request. Null when no more pages.

next_page_token.title: Next Page Token
next_page_token.description: Opaque cursor; pass as `page_token` on next request. Null when no more pages.

system_prompt.title: System Prompt
system_prompt.description: Updated system prompt. Null clears it.

title.title: Title
title.description: Updated document title. Null clears the title.

additional_context.title: Additional Context
additional_context.description: Free-text context to attach to the document. Null clears it.

linked_contexts.title: Linked Contexts
linked_contexts.description: UUIDs of context entries to link. Null clears all linked contexts.

status.description: Target status. `running` and `waiting` are system-only and cannot be set by clients.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether RAG retrieval is enabled for this chat.

max_sources.title: Max Sources
max_sources.description: Maximum number of source documents to retrieve per query.

minimum_score.title: Minimum Score
minimum_score.description: Minimum similarity score for retrieved sources.

questions.title: Questions
questions.description: Clarification questions raised by the LLM.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this run started.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this run was last updated.

segment.title: Segment
segment.description: The text segment that prompted the question.

question.title: Question
question.description: The clarification question to present to the user.

answer.title: Answer
answer.description: The user's answer. Null until answered.

additional_context.title: Additional Context
additional_context.description: Suggested update to the document's additional context.

linked_context.title: Linked Context
linked_context.description: Suggested update to the linked context entry text.

linked_context_id.title: Linked Context Id
linked_context_id.description: UUID of the linked context entry this suggestion applies to.

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Field names consumed by this stage.

skip_if.title: Skip If
skip_if.description: Conditions under which this stage is skipped entirely.

start_if.title: Start If
start_if.description: Conditions that must be met before this stage can start.

continue_if.title: Continue If
continue_if.description: Rules that determine if the stage auto-advances without human review.

text.title: Text
text.description: Updated context text. Null leaves unchanged.
